videos.title: What is Artificial Intelligence?
videos.description: This video provides a clear and concise introduction to artificial intelligence, defining what it is, its goals, and its importance in today's world. Perfect for absolute beginners.

videos.title: Artificial Intelligence Explained | What Is AI? | AI Tutorial For Beginners | Simplilearn
videos.description: A comprehensive beginner-friendly tutorial that covers the fundamentals of AI, including its history, types, applications, and basic concepts, giving a solid overview for those new to the field.

videos.title: AI vs Machine Learning vs Deep Learning | What's The Difference?
videos.description: This video clearly differentiates between Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning, explaining their relationships and distinct characteristics, which is essential for building a correct conceptual framework.

videos.title: How Does AI Work? | Artificial Intelligence | Simply Explained
videos.description: A straightforward explanation of the fundamental principles behind artificial intelligence, touching on how machines learn and make decisions without diving into complex technical details, perfect for a high-level overview.

videos.title: What is MLOps? MLOps Explained in 100 Seconds
videos.description: A quick and foundational overview of MLOps, explaining the critical practices for deploying and maintaining machine learning models in production environments. Essential for understanding the 'Deployment' aspect of this week.

videos.title: How AI Companies Make Money - Business Models
videos.description: This video breaks down various business models employed by AI companies, from SaaS to API-driven services and data monetization. It's crucial for understanding how value is captured in the AI economy.

videos.title: How to Launch a Product - Michael Seibel (Y Combinator)
videos.description: Michael Seibel, from Y Combinator, shares invaluable advice on the fundamental principles of launching a product. While not AI-specific, these foundational strategies for getting your product to market are universally applicable to AI startups.

videos.title: Monetization Strategies for AI Products: Unlocking Value and Revenue Streams
videos.description: Explore different strategies for monetizing AI products, including subscription models, usage-based pricing, freemium, and value-based pricing. This video provides practical insights into generating revenue from your AI solution.
